description: bundled Python unittest import failed: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'requests'
root_cause: repo requirements are not installed in a locked research environment
corrective_action: create isolated locked environment and rerun Python tests
retest_result: 9 Python tests passed under Python 3.12.13 locked environment

description: npm test rewrote generatedAt with current time despite unchanged inputs
root_cause: generator embeds wall-clock time in tracked output
corrective_action: derive generatedAt from latest source search_date
retest_result: deterministic generation test passed across two consecutive runs

description: RIS JF journal name was empty after rispy parsing
root_cause: rispy 0.10.0 maps JF to alternate_title3 but adapter did not read that key
corrective_action: add alternate_title3 after higher-priority normalized journal keys
retest_result: RIS parser regression passed; full Python suite 9 passed

description: Gate 0 flagged the Google Drive parent folder name 여형준님 in source provenance
root_cause: raw substring scan did not distinguish provenance paths from active research content
corrective_action: exclude the exact reference provenance manifest while retaining active app/data marker tests
retest_result: three identity tests passed and actual Gate 0 passed

description: legacy PubMed runs stored only 50 or 100 records from larger hit sets
root_cause: adapter defaulted to a fixed max_records value and did not reconcile hit export and import counts
corrective_action: make full retrieval the default; fail above PubMed 10000 UID limit; record reconciliation fields
retest_result: six search pipeline tests passed including full retrieval and over-limit failure

description: Gate 0 found a Yeo study label after generation through the workspace junction
root_cause: generator inferred study identity from the current working directory name
corrective_action: read research_v2/project_identity.json and fail closed for non-Kwon identity; add generated identity regression test
retest_result: two targeted generation tests passed; Gate 0 passed; full Python suite 13 passed

description: release validator flagged 여형준님 in the immutable source path stored by reference_manifest.json
root_cause: release identity scan lacked the narrow provenance exception already used by Gate 0
corrective_action: exclude only protocol/reference/reference_manifest.json and retain active-file marker detection
retest_result: two release-validator identity tests passed; preflight output contains no yeo_marker failure
